position_id.description: Computed from the raw API's `_id` field, falling back to `position_id` to match legacy firstString.

type.description: Computed from the raw API's nested `type.name` object field, falling back to scalar `type` to match legacy nestedName.

country_id.description: Computed from the raw API's nested `location.country.id` object field.

country_name.description: Computed from the raw API's nested `location.country.name` object field.
